description: The GripPoseReferenceEditor component handles the UI Edit Mode behavior of adjusting Raw Data Tools in the user's hand. See UI Edit Mode for more information.

fields.ReferenceRoot: The root slot of the tool tip holder.
fields.Item: The root slot of the tooltip being adjusted.
fields.Slider: The slider to use to adjust the tool tip during grabbing.
fields.PoseReference: The grip pose reference to be modifying.
fields.HideVisualOnEnd: Hide the visual when it's not being grabbed.
fields.RootPosition: The root position of the gripping pose reference.
fields.RootRotation: The root rotation of the gripping pose reference.
fields.RootScale: The root scale of the gripping pose reference.

usage: Not used directly by the user. Please see UI Edit Mode.
